events.name: SettingsChangeEvent
events.trigger: One or more fields written via SettingsWriter. One event per changed field (batchable). Fires afterCommit on the SettingValue row.
consumers: modules that need to react to specific settings changes

events.name: SettingsGroupResolved
events.trigger: SettingsResolver::resolve() completed a cascade. Optional — fires for observability + cache warm.

payload.cascade_depth: int — how many scope levels contributed

events.name: SettingsWriteRefused
events.trigger: Write refused by validation, locked, or permission. Emitted so ops can spot misuse.
